creator: ohauer@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 174329
patch update to 1.3.9

The patch updates serf to version 1.3.9

Build tested on 10.3(amd64) against 
- base openssl
- libressl 
- openssl-1.1.0 (ports svn rev. 420967)

Changelog:
http://mail-archives.apache.org/mod_mbox/serf-announce/201609.mbox/browser

I've not included changes from bug #206359
